title: Add input validation to Calculator
body:
The Calculator struct accepts any input without validation. Add a ValidateInputs method that returns an error for overflow conditions.

Files to investigate:
- calculator.go
- calculator_test.go

title: Add subtraction support to Calculator
body:
The Calculator only supports addition. Add a Subtract method that returns the difference of two integers.

Files to investigate:
- calculator.go
- calculator_test.go

title: Add multiplication support to Calculator
body:
The Calculator needs a Multiply method. Should handle zero and negative numbers correctly.

Files to investigate:
- calculator.go
- calculator_test.go

title: Add division support with zero-division handling
body:
Add a Divide method to Calculator. Must return an error when dividing by zero and return a float64 for non-integer results.

Files to investigate:
- calculator.go
- calculator_test.go
